items.name_en: (With full packaging)!!️【New】Ophidia Series Mini Shoulder Bag. This Ophidia series shoulder bag is crafted from GG Supreme canvas, injecting new life into a classic design. The bag comes with two removable shoulder straps, one chain and one leather, and is adorned with classic striped webbing elements and double G hardware. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, oatmeal cotton-linen lining with double G, removable chain shoulder strap (15.5cm long); removable adjustable leather shoulder strap (height adjustable from 51.5cm to 58.5cm) Zipper closure, Weight: approx. 0.35kg.
items.name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️【New】Ophidia Series Mini Shoulder Bag. This Ophidia series shoulder bag is crafted from GG Supreme canvas, injecting new life into a classic design. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, oatmeal cotton-linen lining with double G, removable chain shoulder strap (15.5cm long); removable adjustable leather shoulder strap (height adjustable from 51.5cm to 58.5cm) Zipper closure, Weight: approx. 0.35kg.
Model: 795208
Dimensions: 18.5(W) x 10(H) x 10cm(D)
Color: Oatmeal/pvc
Max capacity: iPhone Plus, card holder, Airpods earbuds and lipstick

items.name_en: (With full set of packaging)!!️ GG Marmont Zip Wallet, Dear Alessandro Michele, every beloved design is connected to the House's past, and the Creative Director has brought it into the current collection. At the core of this precious collection, the GG Marmont is instantly recognized by its Double G monogram—appearing as matching resin hardware on the top of this wallet. Moiré lining, Double G, interior zip pocket, snap closure.
